brief.want: Keep control of the Lower Town through useful informants.
brief.fear: The Watch will lose authority before the uprising begins.
brief.contradiction: He values order but manufactures pressure that creates resistance.
brief.secret_or_withheld_fact: The buckle repair is leverage for inspecting Kalev's ledger.

voice.summary: Controlled, observant, and threatening without shouting.
voice.diction: Short demands framed as routine procedure.

source_notes.summary: Support record completing P1-004 reference validation.
